-% NOTE (status, 2026-07-02 session 0003-horizon-T2): the soundness re-signing flagged by the
-% earlier note is DONE (openImmersion_beckChevalley carries `[IsAffine V]`,
-% `hF : F.IsQuasicoherent`, `[IsSeparated (terminal.from X)]`).  Stage 2 is now decomposed
-% differently (and more finely) than the original legs-restriction plan: the mate formula
-% factors bareBC.app as (p'-unit) ≫ isos (\cref{lem:openimm_pullback_counit_isIso} inverts the
-% p-counit), fully-faithful p'_* turns the unit node into essential-image membership, membership
-% is cover-local (\cref{lem:essimage_pushforward_cover_local}, sorry-free), and the SOLE residual
-% is the affine-local member node \cref{lem:openimm_bareBC_app_isIso_affine}
-% (`openImmersion_pushPull_essImage_member`).
+% NOTE (status, 2026-07-02 session 0007-horizon-T2): the Stage-2 chain is now fully CLOSED.
+% The member node \cref{lem:openimm_bareBC_app_isIso_affine} is proved in the new
+% Cohomology/AffinePushPullEssImage.lean (restrict_pullback_pushforward_essImage): the pullback
+% pseudofunctor + the open-open pushforward--restriction commutation
+% (pushforwardRestrictOpensIso, the same-opens-functor pattern) + the affine heart
+% (pullback_pushforward_affineOpen_essImage: affinePushforwardPullbackBaseChange over the
+% ABSTRACT ring pushout, Spec of which is cartesian, with the isoOfRangeEq range transport).
+% For the affine tilde dictionary the square of \cref{lem:openimm_beckchevalley} is specialized
+% in Lean to p = V₀.ι of an affine open V₀ : X.Opens (the form every consumer instantiates).
+% Consequently \cref{lem:openimm_bareBC_isIso}, \cref{lem:openimm_beckchevalley} and
+% \cref{lem:twisted_cech_nerve_per_sigma} are sorry-free.
 
 % =====================================================================================
 % Stage-2 decomposition chain for lem:openimm_beckchevalley (carved iter-329, slug obc329).
